query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(paid_at, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as row_count, SUM(amount) as total_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' AND paid_at >= '2026-04-01' AND paid_at <= '2026-05-08'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(paid_at, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;
